_about: PDLC AI-Harness run configuration. Copy to run-config.json and edit per contributor. Non-secret values only — secrets (GITHUB_TOKEN, JIRA_API_TOKEN) come from .env and must never be committed. Values here are overridden by matching environment variables if set.

github._mode_help: 'shared' = run against the main repo (owner=TimLafleur-w) using your contributor access; the repo already exists so BE-11 skips creation. 'own' = set owner to your own GitHub username to create and run against your own copy.
github._token_help: GITHUB_TOKEN (classic PAT with 'repo' scope) is read from .env, never stored here.

jira._key_help: projectKey maps the canonical design-time epic keys (BE-1..BE-12) into your own Jira project. Change it if your project uses a different key; the canonical BE-* identifiers inside the epic files stay as-is and are remapped on import.
jira._token_help: JIRA_API_TOKEN is read from .env, never stored here.
